$$
\renewcommand{\bm}{\boldsymbol}

% --- math spaces and number sets ---
\providecommand{\N}{\mathbb{N}}
\providecommand{\Z}{\mathbb{Z}}
\providecommand{\Q}{\mathbb{Q}}
\providecommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\providecommand{\C}{\mathbb{C}}

% --- functions / operators ---
\newcommand{\argmin}{\operatorname{arg\,min}}
\newcommand{\argmax}{\operatorname{arg\,max}}
\newcommand{\sign}{\operatorname{sign}}
\newcommand{\diag}{\operatorname{diag}}
\newcommand{\trace}{\operatorname{tr}}
\newcommand{\spn}{\operatorname{span}}
\newcommand{\I}{\mathbb{I}}
\newcommand{\order}{\mathcal{O}}
\newcommand{\pd}[2]{\frac{\partial{#1}}{\partial #2}}

% --- sums ---
\newcommand{\sumin}{\sum_{i=1}^n}
\newcommand{\sumim}{\sum_{i=1}^m}
\newcommand{\sumjn}{\sum_{j=1}^n}
\newcommand{\sumjp}{\sum_{j=1}^p}
\newcommand{\sumid}{\sum_{i=1}^d}
\newcommand{\meanin}{\frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^n}

% --- linear algebra ---
\newcommand{\one}{\boldsymbol{1}}
\newcommand{\zero}{\mathbf{0}}
\newcommand{\id}{\boldsymbol{I}}
\newcommand{\scp}[2]{\left\langle #1, #2 \right\rangle}
\newcommand{\mat}[1]{\begin{pmatrix} #1 \end{pmatrix}}

% --- probability and stats ---
\renewcommand{\P}{\mathbb{P}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\var}{\mathsf{Var}}
\newcommand{\cov}{\mathsf{Cov}}
\newcommand{\normal}{\mathcal{N}}
\newcommand{\iid}{\overset{i.i.d}{\sim}}

% --- ML notation ---
\newcommand{\Xspace}{\mathcal{X}}
\newcommand{\Yspace}{\mathcal{Y}}
\newcommand{\xv}{\mathbf{x}}
\newcommand{\yv}{\mathbf{y}}
\newcommand{\wv}{\mathbf{w}}
\newcommand{\xtil}{\tilde{\mathbf{x}}}
\newcommand{\xy}{(\xv, y)}
\newcommand{\Xmat}{\mathbf{X}}
\newcommand{\D}{\mathcal{D}}
\newcommand{\Dn}{\D_n}
\newcommand{\xyi}[1][i]{\left(\xv^{(#1)}, y^{(#1)}\right)}
\renewcommand{\xi}[1][i]{\xv^{(#1)}}
\newcommand{\yi}[1][i]{y^{(#1)}}

% --- prediction functions ---
\newcommand{\fx}{f(\xv)}
\newcommand{\fh}{\hat{f}}
\newcommand{\fxh}{\fh(\xv)}
\newcommand{\fxi}{f\left(\xv^{(i)}\right)}
\newcommand{\fxih}{\hat{f}\left(\xv^{(i)}\right)}

% --- theta / parameters ---
\newcommand{\thetav}{\bm{\theta}}
\newcommand{\thetab}{\bm{\theta}}
\newcommand{\thetah}{\hat{\theta}}
\newcommand{\thetavh}{\bm{\hat\theta}}
\newcommand{\thetat}[1][t]{\thetav^{[#1]}}
\newcommand{\thetatn}[1][t]{\thetav^{[#1+1]}}

% --- yhat ---
\newcommand{\yh}{\hat{y}}
\newcommand{\yih}{\hat{y}^{(i)}}

% --- optimization-specific (from optim-basics.tex) ---
\newcommand{\CC}[1]{\mathcal{C}^{#1}}
\newcommand{\CCinf}{\mathcal{C}^{\infty}}
\renewcommand{\S}{\mathcal{S}}
\newcommand{\xvs}{\bm{x}^\ast}
\newcommand{\xs}{x^\ast}
\newcommand{\fxvs}{f(\xvs)}
\renewcommand{\H}{\mathbf{H}}
\providecommand{\eps}{\epsilon}
\newcommand{\A}{\mathbf{A}}
\newcommand{\bv}{\mathbf{b}}
\newcommand{\zv}{\mathbf{z}}
\newcommand{\V}{\mathbf{V}}
\newcommand{\vvmax}{\bm{v}_\text{max}}
\newcommand{\vvmin}{\bm{v}_\text{min}}
\newcommand{\lammax}{\lambda_\text{max}}
\newcommand{\lammin}{\lambda_\text{min}}

% --- BO / surrogate model (from ml-mbo.tex) ---
\newcommand{\xvsi}[1][i]{\xv^{[#1]}}
\newcommand{\ysi}[1][i]{y^{[#1]}}
\newcommand{\Dt}[1][t]{\D^{[#1]}}
\newcommand{\sh}{\hat{s}}
\newcommand{\fmin}{f_{\min}}

% --- empirical risk shortcut (used in ex06+) ---
\newcommand{\Remp}{\mathcal{R}_{\text{emp}}}
$$
